option.name: title
option.value: WiFi直连设备扫描连接

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660845,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"389d8393-2919-4bee-90fd-46de570c78b1","name":"task_planning","ch_name":"任务规划完成","display_name":"任务规划中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":false,"loading_display_type":"point"},"toolCallId":"389d8393-2919-4bee-90fd-46de570c78b1","toolCallName":"task_planning"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660846,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"389d8393-2919-4bee-90fd-46de570c78b1","display_name":"任务规划完成"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"389d8393-2919-4bee-90fd-46de570c78b1","content":""}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
用户想要修改现有的 WiFi Direct 连接功能，从自动连接发现的第一个设备改为支持扫描到多个设备，然后让用户点击选择连接。

从提供的 MainActivity.kt 文件内容来看，当前实现是：
1. 扫描设备时，只保存第一个发现的设备到 targetDevice
2. 连接按钮直接连接这个 targetDevice

我需要修改这个逻辑：
1. 扫描时应该收集所有发现的设备
2. 在 UI 上显示设备列表
3. 让用户可以选择要连接的设备

首先我需要查看当前的布局文件 activity_main.xml 来了解现有的 UI 结构，然后修改 MainActivity.kt 来支持多设备选择和连接功能。
"},"timestamp":1773660848,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"我将帮您修改 WiFi Direct 功能，使其支持扫描多个设备并让用户选择连接。首先让我查看当前的布局文件来了解 UI 结构。\n\n"},"timestamp":1773660851,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660851,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","name":"read_file","ch_name":"读取文件","display_name":"读取文件中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","toolCallName":"read_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1773660852,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","document":{"sub_content":"activity_main.xml","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml","sub_content_tip":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml"}},"toolCallId":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","delta":"{\"path\": \"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml\", \"explanation\": \"需要查看当前布局文件的结构，以便修改为支持设备列表选择功能\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660852,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"call_bb44803a-a1a2-455a-bb39-c643294c311b","content":"{\"content\": \"<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\"?>\\n<LinearLayout xmlns:android=\\\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\\\"\\n android:layout_width=\\\"match_parent\\\"\\n android:layout_height=\\\"match_parent\\\"\\n android:orientation=\\\"vertical\\\"\\n android:padding=\\\"20dp\\\"\\n android:layout_marginTop=\\\"100dp\\\">\\n\\n <TextView\\n android:layout_marginTop=\\\"100dp\\\"\\n android:id=\\\"@+id/statusText\\\"\\n android:layout_width=\\\"match_parent\\\"\\n android:layout_height=\\\"0dp\\\"\\n android:layout_weight=\\\"1\\\"\\n android:text=\\\"状态：等待操作\\\"\\n android:textSize=\\\"16sp\\\"\\n android:fontFamily=\\\"monospace\\\"\\n android:scrollbars=\\\"vertical\\\"/>\\n\\n <Button\\n android:id=\\\"@+id/btnDiscover\\\"\\n android:layout_width=\\\"match_parent\\\"\\n android:layout_height=\\\"wrap_content\\\"\\n android:text=\\\"1. 扫描设备\\\"\\n android:layout_marginTop=\\\"10dp\\\"/>\\n\\n <Button\\n android:id=\\\"@+id/btnConnect\\\"\\n android:layout_width=\\\"match_parent\\\"\\n android:layout_height=\\\"wrap_content\\\"\\n android:text=\\\"2. 连接设备\\\"\\n android:layout_marginTop=\\\"10dp\\\"/>\\n</LinearLayout>\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"1.09 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 33}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
现在我看到当前的布局文件结构。当前只有一个 TextView 用于显示状态，两个按钮用于扫描和连接。我需要修改布局来支持设备列表显示和选择功能。

我需要：
1. 修改布局文件，添加一个 RecyclerView 或 ListView 来显示设备列表
2. 修改 MainActivity.kt 来支持多设备存储和选择连接

由于布局文件较小，我可以先修改布局文件，然后修改 MainActivity.kt。让我先修改布局文件。
"},"timestamp":1773660857,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"我将修改布局文件，添加一个设备列表来支持多设备选择和连接功能。\n\n"},"timestamp":1773660858,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660858,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_fc90c2cb-bb9c-4144-8dd5-97257f057a3a","name":"edit_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeApply","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"call_fc90c2cb-bb9c-4144-8dd5-97257f057a3a","toolCallName":"edit_file"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_fc90c2cb-bb9c-4144-8dd5-97257f057a3a","document":{"file_path":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml","sub_content":"activity_main.xml","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml","sub_content_tip":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml","apply_content":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="match_parent"
 android:orientation="vertical"
 android:padding="20dp">

 <TextView
 android:id="@+id/statusText"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="状态：等待操作"
 android:textSize="16sp"
 android:fontFamily="monospace"/>

 <Button
 android:id="@+id/btnDiscover"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="扫描设备"
 android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>

 <TextView
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="发现设备："
 android:textSize="14sp"
 android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
 android:layout_marginBottom="5dp"/>

 <ListView
 android:id="@+id/deviceListView"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="0dp"
 android:layout_weight="1"
 android:layout_marginBottom="10dp"/>

 <Button
 android:id="@+id/btnConnect"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="连接选中设备"
 android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>
</LinearLayout>","instruction":"修改布局文件，添加设备列表显示区域，移除不必要的顶部边距，重新组织布局结构","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1773660858,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660866,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_fc90c2cb-bb9c-4144-8dd5-97257f057a3a","result":{"commit_id":["1d7c6650178df4a19c86315ec29e4e98b52ae6a0","b0529c38fb349294c10dc857c45f92794ff36dbb"]},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"call_fc90c2cb-bb9c-4144-8dd5-97257f057a3a","content":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="match_parent"
 android:orientation="vertical"
 android:padding="20dp">

 <TextView
 android:id="@+id/statusText"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="状态：等待操作"
 android:textSize="16sp"
 android:fontFamily="monospace"/>

 <Button
 android:id="@+id/btnDiscover"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="扫描设备"
 android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>

 <TextView
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="发现设备："
 android:textSize="14sp"
 android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
 android:layout_marginBottom="5dp"/>

 <ListView
 android:id="@+id/deviceListView"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="0dp"
 android:layout_weight="1"
 android:layout_marginBottom="10dp"/>

 <Button
 android:id="@+id/btnConnect"
 android:layout_width="match_parent"
 android:layout_height="wrap_content"
 android:text="连接选中设备"
 android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>
</LinearLayout>"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
布局文件修改成功，现在我需要修改 MainActivity.kt 文件来支持多设备扫描和选择连接功能。我需要：

1. 将 targetDevice 从单个设备改为设备列表
2. 添加设备列表适配器
3. 修改扫描逻辑来收集所有设备
4. 修改连接逻辑来连接用户选择的设备

让我修改 MainActivity.kt 文件。
"},"timestamp":1773660869,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"现在我将修改 MainActivity.kt 文件来实现多设备扫描和选择连接功能。\n\n"},"timestamp":1773660870,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660870,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_19f77e5d-b1cd-4525-bdde-6da9785b62ed","name":"edit_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeApply","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"call_19f77e5d-b1cd-4525-bdde-6da9785b62ed","toolCallName":"edit_file"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"\n我已经成功修改了布局文件和 MainActivity.kt 文件，现在需要检查一下是否还需要修改 WifiDirectManager.kt 文件来确保它能够正确支持多设备功能。让我先查看一下 WifiDirectManager.kt 文件的内容，看看是否需要调整。\n"},"timestamp":1773660894,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"现在让我检查 WifiDirectManager.kt 文件，确保它能够正确支持多设备扫描和连接功能。\n\n"},"timestamp":1773660894,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660894,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","name":"read_file","ch_name":"读取文件","display_name":"读取文件中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","toolCallName":"read_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1773660895,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","document":{"sub_content":"WifiDirectManager.kt","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt","sub_content_tip":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt"}},"toolCallId":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","delta":"{\"path\": \"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt\", \"explanation\": \"需要查看WifiDirectManager的实现，确保它支持多设备扫描和连接功能\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660895,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","content":"{\"content\": \"package com.example.p2pconnect\\n\\nimport android.Manifest\\nimport android.content.BroadcastReceiver\\nimport android.content.Context\\nimport android.content.Intent\\nimport android.content.IntentFilter\\nimport android.net.wifi.WpsInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pConfig\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pManager\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresPermission\\n\\nclass WifiDirectManager(\\n private val context: Context,\\n private val listener: ConnectionListener\\n) : WifiP2pManager.ChannelListener {\\n\\n companion object {\\n private const val TAG = \\\"WifiDirectManager\\\"\\n }\\n\\n private val manager: WifiP2pManager =\\n context.getSystemService(Context.WIFI_P2P_SERVICE) as WifiP2pManager\\n private val channel: WifiP2pManager.Channel =\\n manager.initialize(context, context.mainLooper, this)\\n\\n private val receiver: BroadcastReceiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {\\n when (intent.action) {\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n manager.requestPeers(channel) { peerList ->\\n peerList.deviceList.forEach { device ->\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"发现设备：${device.deviceName} (${device.deviceAddress})\\\")\\n listener.onDeviceFound(device)\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n val info = intent.getParcelableExtra<WifiP2pInfo>(WifiP2pManager.EXTRA_WIFI_P2P_INFO)\\n if (info != null && info.groupFormed) {\\n if (info.isGroupOwner) {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 GO\\\")\\n } else {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 Client, GO IP = ${info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress}\\\")\\n listener.onConnectionSuccess(info)\\n }\\n } else {\\n listener.onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n interface ConnectionListener {\\n fun onDeviceFound(device: WifiP2pDevice)\\n fun onConnectionSuccess(info: WifiP2pInfo)\\n fun onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n\\n init {\\n val intentFilter = IntentFilter().apply {\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_STATE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_THIS_DEVICE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n }\\n context.registerReceiver(receiver, intentFilter)\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun discoverPeers() {\\n manager.discoverPeers(channel, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"扫描启动成功\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"扫描失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun connectToDevice(device: WifiP2pDevice) {\\n val config = WifiP2pConfig().apply {\\n deviceAddress = device.deviceAddress\\n wps.setup = WpsInfo.PBC // 关键：使用 PBC 方式，对应 Linux 的 wpa_cli pbc\\n // 如果使用 PIN 码：\\n // wps.setup = WpsInfo.KEYPAD\\n // wps.pin = \\\"12345678\\\"\\n }\\n\\n manager.connect(channel, config, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接请求已发送\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"连接请求失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n fun onDestroy() {\\n try {\\n context.unregisterReceiver(receiver)\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"Receiver 注销失败\\\", e)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onChannelDisconnected() {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"WiFi Direct Channel 断开\\\")\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"3.87 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 110}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
很好！WifiDirectManager.kt 文件已经支持多设备扫描功能。从代码中可以看到：

1. 在 `WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION` 处理中，它遍历 `peerList.deviceList.forEach` 并调用 `listener.onDeviceFound(device)` 对每个发现的设备进行回调
2. `connectToDevice` 方法接受一个 `WifiP2pDevice` 参数，可以连接指定的设备

这意味着 WifiDirectManager 已经支持多设备扫描和选择连接的功能，不需要修改。

现在让我检查一下是否有任何编译错误或需要优化的地方，然后完成任务。
"},"timestamp":1773660899,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"很好！WifiDirectManager.kt 文件已经完美支持多设备扫描和选择连接功能。现在让我检查一下是否有编译错误。



"},"timestamp":1773660900,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660901,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_b925cd6b-2f04-4b05-86a1-4283e2ef04ff","name":"read_lints","ch_name":"代码检查","display_name":"代码检查中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"call_b925cd6b-2f04-4b05-86a1-4283e2ef04ff","toolCallName":"read_lints"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1773660903,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_b925cd6b-2f04-4b05-86a1-4283e2ef04ff"},"toolCallId":"call_b925cd6b-2f04-4b05-86a1-4283e2ef04ff","delta":"{\"paths\": [\"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/MainActivity.kt\", \"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml\"]}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
lint检查返回空数组，说明没有编译错误。现在让我总结一下完成的工作，然后使用attempt_completion工具来完成任务。

我已经成功完成了以下修改：
1. 修改了布局文件，添加了设备列表显示区域
2. 修改了MainActivity.kt，实现了多设备扫描、列表显示和选择连接功能
3. 确认WifiDirectManager.kt已经支持多设备功能，无需修改

功能现在支持：
- 扫描时显示所有发现的设备列表
- 用户可以从列表中选择要连接的设备
- 点击连接按钮连接选中的设备
"},"timestamp":1773660906,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773660908,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_2e47f3f9-787e-4898-ba94-affd4f2ab067","name":"attempt_completion","ch_name":"总结","display_name":"总结中","render_type":"MarkdownPreview","default_show":true,"need_result":false},"toolCallId":"call_2e47f3f9-787e-4898-ba94-affd4f2ab067","toolCallName":"attempt_completion"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_2e47f3f9-787e-4898-ba94-affd4f2ab067","document":{"content":"已成功将WiFi Direct连接功能从自动连接改为支持多设备扫描和选择连接。主要修改包括：1）在布局中添加设备列表显示区域；2）在MainActivity中实现设备列表管理、选择逻辑和连接功能；3）确认WifiDirectManager已支持多设备功能无需修改。现在用户可以扫描多个设备并选择特定设备进行连接。","task_status":""}},"timestamp":1773660908,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660909,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_2e47f3f9-787e-4898-ba94-affd4f2ab067","result":{},"display_name":"总结"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"call_2e47f3f9-787e-4898-ba94-affd4f2ab067","content":""}

option.name: question
option.value: 帮我把这个drur wrivxg连接设备改为扫描到设备，支持点击选择连接
